text: I'm planning a trip to Europe this summer with my family. Any tips or must-see places?
I've traveled to Italy and France. Happy to share recommendations! Italy was amazing - especially Rome and Florence. The Colosseum is a must-see.
I'll book the Airbnb in Prague! Has anyone been there?
Can anyone suggest a good pediatrician near Downtown Austin for a 2-year-old?
Dr. Kim is the best pediatrician in Austin! My kids actually look forward to dentist visits now. Call Monday morning - they release slots weekly.
Looking for a reliable home contractor for a kitchen remodel. Any recommendations?
Carlos did our kitchen last year. Excellent work, on time, and fair pricing. I can DM you his contact.
What's the best way to teach a 6-year-old to read? Apps, books, or tutors?
We used the Reading Rainbow app and it worked great! Also, regular library visits helped a lot.
Need restaurant recommendations for a first date in Austin. Looking for something romantic but not too expensive.
Try Odd Duck! Great outdoor seating, unique menu, and not too pricey. Perfect for a date!
What's the best laptop for a computer science student? Budget around $1000.
Lenovo ThinkPad all the way! Great keyboard, Linux friendly, and very durable. I've had mine for 4 years.
